productDisplayName: UCB Men's Garment Dyed Green T-shirt
description: CompositionGrass green polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton in a unique dying process, with twill tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, buttoned chest placket, short sleeves, vented hem with twill tape lining, stitch detailing on the seams and embroidered Italia and flag logo on the right chest and patch pocket on the left chestFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not scrub Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this grass green polo neck t-shirt made with a unique dying process from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the thickly embroidered Italia logo on the left chest enhances your regal style and pays homage to the Brands' land of origin. The slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
